## Source: ghsa-malware (84420cf94f4b56e0aa3cb3e0fa23b2aea98b1bcf47692360e7a3b9578e92b3f3)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (41aacbd733d26afad7933e31f87d51fa0d748969082bd229cc90b3bdbf2d7b9b)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'systemd-daemon' @ 0.0.1 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:
- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

It is considered malicious because:
- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
